hero.subtitle: Since 1934
hero.title: Bringing Together Travel and Tourism Professionals Worldwide.

year.label: Founded
year.desc: Skål International was founded in Paris.

clubs.label: Clubs Worldwide
clubs.desc: Clubs and members located in over 75 countries.

izmir.title: Izmir, The Pearl of the Aegean
izmir.p1: With its 8500-year history, unique nature, and endless energy, Izmir is one of the most vibrant stops where the Skål spirit lives.
izmir.p2: A center of trade and culture from ancient times to the present, Izmir keeps hospitality alive in every corner, from Ephesus to Pergamon, from the narrow streets of Kemeraltı to the modern coast of Kordon.
izmir.p3: As Skål Izmir, we blend this deep-rooted tourism potential of our city with our global friendship network, continuing to introduce the 'Pearl of the Aegean' to the world.

network.title: A Tourism Network Growing With Friendship
network.desc: By bringing together the local professionals of the industry, Skål Izmir Club offers not just a business network, but a family environment shaping the future of Izmir tourism.
network.desc2: We contribute to our city's sustainable tourism goals and represent Izmir's values on global platforms together with our members.

collaborations.title: Skål International | Collaborations
collaborations.desc: We are proud of our strong ties and collaborations with leading organizations in the travel and tourism industry.

events_section.title: Stay Updated on Our Events
events_section.desc: From our traditional 'Business Lunch' events to after-work 'Happy Hour' gatherings; every moment we come together with Skål Izmir members is the beginning of a new collaboration and strong friendship. Don't miss these special moments where we share our club synergy and our current program.

contact.title: Connect With Us
contact.desc: For your questions, suggestions, or membership applications, you can contact the Skål Izmir Board of Directors and our secretariat. We will respond to your requests as soon as possible.
